result.stdout:
Description:
  Run arbitrary project scripts

Usage:
  run-script [<scripts>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <scripts>  One or more scripts to run

Options:
  --if-present            Don't exit with an error code if the script isn't found
  --script-shell <shell>  The shell to use when running scripts (cmd, pwsh, sh, etc.)
  -v, --verbose           Enable verbose output
  --version               Show version information
  -?, -h, --help          Show help and usage information
